shared_style: Cute-strange greenhouse collectible style, polished 2D game art, soft rounded shapes, crisp readable silhouette, subtle painterly texture, bright but not neon colors, mobile idle game asset, clean edges, no text, no watermark.

prompts.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: idle web game creature album card
Primary request: Create a starter-friendly Herb family plant-creature gatherer for 이상한 씨앗상회.
Subject: A small round leafy creature with two stubby feet, soft sprout ears, a curious face, and a tiny leaf satchel for gathering. It should feel like the first collectible creature a player receives.
Style/medium: Cute-strange greenhouse collectible style, polished 2D game art, soft rounded shapes, subtle painterly texture, clean mobile readability.
Composition/framing: Centered full-body character, generous padding, simple clean removable background, readable at 96px.
Color palette: Fresh herb greens, warm leaf yellow highlights, cream facial accents, tiny deep greenhouse teal details.
Constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark, no realistic insect anatomy, no busy background, friendly expression, clear silhouette.
Avoid: Copyrighted characters, brand references, horror, photorealism, dark low-contrast shapes, excessive tiny details.
acceptance: matches Herb family with leafy fresh motifs
reads clearly as a friendly common gatherer creature at 96px
full subject is centered with generous padding
no text, watermark, logo, or copyrighted character resemblance
background is clean enough for card/icon use
